## Anti-pattern name

What should this anti-pattern be called?

## Problem behavior

Describe the product behavior that weakens trust or control.

## Why it fails

What user harm, confusion, or product risk can result?

## Better pattern

Which template or control would improve the design?

## Example context

Where have you seen or imagined this issue?
